data.title: Gate.io launches BANK perpetual contract for the first time, supporting up to 50x leverage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Gate.io has launched the first BANK perpetual contract real-time trading (USDT settlement) at 01:15 (UTC+8) on April 19, supporting 1-50 times leverage.

data.title: Bitcoin Enters New Phase: Analyst Predicts Positive Movement In 2025
data.description:
According to a recent CryptoQuant Quicktake post, Bitcoin (BTC) may be close to completing its price correction for the current market cycle. The premier cryptocurrency appears primed for positive movement in 2025, despite lingering macroeconomic uncertainty. Bitcoin Looks Ready To Reverse Trend In a Quicktake post, CryptoQuant contributor Crypto Dan highlighted that BTC is currently undergoing a correction phase similar to the one observed in 2024. The analyst noted that the amount of BTC held for less than one week to one month can serve as an indicator of how “overheated” the crypto market is
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/bitcoin-enters-new-phase-analyst-predicts-positive-movement-in-2025/

data.title: ANAP, a Tokyo Stock Exchange-listed company, announced that it has purchased 16.6591 BTC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: ANAP, a Tokyo Stock Exchange-listed company, announced that it had purchased 16.6591 BTC for nearly 200 million yen and managed it through its consolidated subsidiary ANAP Lightning Capital established in February 2025.

data.title: Canary Capital Proposes TRX-Tracking ETF
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Canary Capital is seeking to launch an ETF aimed at tracking the price of Tron's native token, TRX. The hedge fund submitted an S-1 form for the Canary Staked TRX ETF to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) last Friday. The proposed fund plans to utilize third-party providers for staking and BitGo as the custodian, with pricing data sourced from CoinDesk Indices.

data.title: Analyst: The group that holds the currency for 3-6 months has recently transferred about 170,000 BTC, which may cause price fluctuations
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Analyst Mignolet published an article on CryptoQuant's blog platform Quicktake warning that the Bitcoin market is about to fluctuate. Mignolet disclosed data showing that about 170,000 BTC are being transferred from groups that hold for 3 to 6 months. The behavior of these short-term holders may cause the current calm BTC price to not last long, and also indicate that the market is about to experience major fluctuations. In contrast, long-term holders only move about 529 BTC per day, highlighting short-term fear or profit-taking, while long-term beliefs remain intact.

data.title: Japanese Fashion Brand ANAP Acquires Bitcoin as Reserve Asset
data.description: According to PANews, Japanese fashion brand ANAP has incorporated Bitcoin into its reserve assets, purchasing approximately 16.6591 Bitcoins valued at around 200 million yen (approximately $1.4 million). The management and operation of these Bitcoin holdings will be overseen by its subsidiary, ANAP Lightning Capital. The company plans to conduct quarterly market value assessments of its Bitcoin holdings, with any gains or losses reflected in its profit and loss statements.

data.title: Aptos community proposes to reduce the annualized return on staking by nearly 50% to improve capital efficiency
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Aptos community member MoonSheisty submitted a proposal on April 18, suggesting that the annualized rate of return on APT token staking be gradually reduced from 7% to 3.79% in order to improve capital efficiency within three months and keep it consistent with other L1 blockchains. The proposal has attracted community attention, and some members are worried that this move may weaken the participation of small validators and affect the level of decentralization. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Brazil's $190 million cryptocurrency Ponzi scheme leader gets record 128-year prison sentence
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: A Brazilian judge recently sentenced Joel Ferreira de Sousa, the money laundering mastermind of the Braiscompany cryptocurrency Ponzi scheme, to a record 128 years in prison. The scam operated from June 2018 to early 2023, defrauding more than 20,000 investors of 11.1 billion reais (about 190 million US dollars). Other people involved in the case were also sentenced, with a total sentence of 170 years. The case is closely related to money laundering operations, and Brazilian police have launched a nationwide crackdown. (The Block)

data.title: Bitcoin whales remain in strong accumulation zone, falling wedge pattern breakout signals potential bullish reversal
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto analyst Scott Melker wrote on the X platform that Bitcoin has broken through the falling wedge pattern that has lasted for several months, indicating a potential bullish reversal. The $88,800 range may be the key resistance level to reverse the market structure. If it fails to break through, the bulls may not be able to continue to maintain strong momentum.
In addition, Bitcoin whales are still in a strong accumulation area. Currently, large holders (whales and sharks) holding more than 100-1000 Bitcoins are rapidly absorbing Bitcoin. The current absorption of this group has exceeded 300% of the annual issuance of Bitcoin. At the same time, the amount of Bitcoin held by exchanges continues to decline, and the annual absorption rate (Yearly Absorption Rates) has dropped to -200%, indicating that investors prefer long-term holding or self-custody. (Note: The annual absorption rate is a comparison of the balance of Bitcoin on the exchange and the number of Bitcoin mining outputs in the same period)

data.title: Tracking transactions ‘very important’ for Belarus as it eyes digital ruble launch in 2026
data.description:
Issuing a digital ruble is a government priority in Belarus and the plan is to have it ready by the end of next year, a high-ranking central bank official has indicated. While “actively working” on its development, the authorities in Minsk are placing an emphasis on one particular feature – the design should allow them […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/tracking-transactions-very-important-for-belarus-as-it-eyes-digital-ruble-launch-in-2026/
